node.text:
Eva Green is THE woman, with her jewels over the years. 

One of my favourite actors in one of my favourite films called “Perfect Sense” with Ewan McGregor 
👨🏻‍🍳 🦠 ✋🏾🥼 👁️ 🧪 👂🏼 🧬 👃🏽 🧼 👄 (ifykyk).
So excited to see her as Ophelia in Wednesday
Those eyes are the real jewels
@adrshmurali yes!!!
The most beautiful
Queen 🖤
eva green i love u
She has great style. Thinkshe wears a few by The Great Frog. Love the Trilobite in Silver, I have one of those myself 🖤
Eva Green is definition (the Greek God) in woman version 🔥🙌🫠
Totally
Maravilhosa ❤️
Awesome in Penny Dreadful 👏
La mujer más bella!
Muse
Huuummm j'adore très
She and her rings against the world
Quem é essa? Me identifiquei com o estilo
J’Adore !!! You Are Very Hot, Very Sexy & Very Beautiful !!! ❤️❤️❤️😍🥰😘.
I hate her because of her choices in movies!
@planetalpha8 oh, I love her films :( you’re entitled to your opinion though
La mujer más bella!
J’Adore !!! You Are Very Hot, Very Sexy & Very Beautiful !!! ❤️❤️❤️😍🥰😘.
